name: compliance trace: per-commit AI provenance manifest section 2.8 compliance_state block lists every framework consulted during code generation
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/consumption-trace.sh" --commit-sha abc123 --consulted-compliance nist-csf-2 --consulted-compliance soc2-tsc --emit "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc123.json" && grep "nist-csf-2" .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc123.json 1>&2 && grep "soc2-tsc" .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc123.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
